user.title: Choose accessory type
user.description: Select the functional accessory template to create.

slots.title: Assign entities to slots
slots.description: Map your existing entities to the required and optional slots. The virtual accessory will combine them into a single HomeKit tile.

bridge.title: Select HomeKit Bridge
bridge.description: Choose which HomeKit Bridge will expose this virtual accessory.

ghosting.title: Automated ghosting
ghosting.description: When enabled, the integration will hide the raw slot entities from this bridge and show only the new virtual accessory.

abort.no_bridge: No HomeKit Bridge found. Add a HomeKit bridge first (Settings → Devices & Services → HomeKit).
